textByHashes.9424f1e044b7103bd326c0be1e9215ac06563467: Hi there. How can I help you today?
textByHashes.61f60aa588d6d84760cef99e2010c75fe9f912d2: I'm just a fur trader. I come across from the city most days.
textByHashes.d32b4b8e430680820d462ac08784ba200b691251: Oh no, that life isn't for me. I'm just a tailor.
textByHashes.e7f244d1c709c284d1d3627841c7892c29533c50: What's brought you out here anyway?
textByHashes.2078f04b053b1f8beb1959cfef1d324643b348b2: That's exciting! I expect I'll be turning some furs into clothes for you soon then?
textByHashes.78a0227234f5fb6afd667d131d680bdc64cc15a5: Why yes I do. Here's what I have available.
textByHashes.771dc9625406aaf0032ca62167c976c539173c0f: Of course! Why don't you take a look?
textByHashes.38c07121d1f94b532b9f180ebf35f3596334b095: I can indeed. What would you like?
textByHashes.207bbe46bc3f6cef85a0ac2d794bd9e000edd87b: You don't have the required items for me to make a mixed hide top for you. You need 20,000 coins and two sunlight antelope fur.
textByHashes.4f012d4dcababc96569720645dd943e14be2b774: You don't have the required items for me to make some mixed hide legs for you. You need 20,000 coins and three fox fur.
textByHashes.16c5e1838e784e93e210114583ebfbcab8075ec0: You don't have the required items for me to make some mixed hide boots for you. You need 17,500 coins and one sunlight antelope fur
textByHashes.0088f0ba13d12281244ec7cef7ccfa5d7bc887ef: You don't have the required items for me to make a mixed hide cape for you. You need 20,000 coins and one jaguar fur.
